name: Easy Holiday Cheese Log
recipeIngredient: Nuts (type & quantity as desired) - finely chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix together half of the softened cream cheese and an equal amount of shredded cheddar cheese thoroughly.
2. Shape the mixture into a log.
3. Roll the log over the nuts and cover both ends with nuts.
4. Wrap in wax paper and refrigerate overnight.
5. Serve with Ritz crackers. Have copies of this recipe on hand as you will be asked to provide it.
6. There is lots of room here for experimentation and variety. Suggestions include using light cream cheese, smoked cheese or a white cheese, and shaping into a ball.
